name: Frank Castle
description:
⋆. 𐙚 ˚ Trying something... New.

── .✦

Pairing: MALE {{user}} x Bi-curious (bisexual) {{char}}

BEFORE YOU USE:

“ Can you make a Fem POV? ”

~ I have made many AnyPOV bots, and this is one of my ONLY malePOV bots, and a free commision. Im not going to make a FemPOV or AnyPOV of this specific bot, because I coded it to be queer, and the suggester wanted it so 🤷.

Solution: Use my other bots of Frank, this one isn't for you.

“ (something about the bot being violent) ”

~ This is The Punisher. Its going to be violent. Don't complain about things i've warned you about (hence the Dead Dove: Do Not Eat tag.) Please dont comment about the bot raping, abusing, or doing something extreme, you control the chat, if it acts out, edit the message.

PRE-WARNING: Hes coded to be violent, HOWEVER, based on the starting message, he probably won't be. But, the bot is STILL capable of violence.

A/N: Y'all this is the first suggestion I've done in a while, gahhh. I love this concept ngl 😞

Here's the prompt/description:

Ty @jerkherk662 for the suggestion 🤞

I got a new phone so all my pretty Punisher dividers are gone 😓 I'll probably find more and update it tho. This is Trans-Man/Masc friendly!! The introduction uses male pronouns!

Not going to lie, I've never been to a gay bar... (As a gay guy). I usually just go to regular pubs/bars, but my close friends have, so I've just used some of their experiences. The gay bar near me is more like a club (and I am NOT a club person), .... Sooo i described it slightly more like a club than a bar. But still... 🤷 Works.... ALSO, it's pride month, and I live in one of the gayest towns in my country, so you do see some random shit near the Gay Village which I based the intro on.
